name: Olive Garden Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Refrigerated chocolate chip, cookie dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Generously grease the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Combine the margarine with the chocolate cookie crumbs. Press onto the bottom and sides of the pan.
4. Using an electric mixer on high speed, combine cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and flour until smooth. Add vanilla and sour cream, mixing just until blended.
5. Pour half of the batter into the prepared crust. Cut the cookie dough into golf ball-sized chunks and drop them into the batter. Sprinkle in chocolate chips. Pour over the remaining batter.
6. Bake for 60 minutes. Turn off the oven and open the door to the broil position. Allow the cake to remain in the oven for 30 more minutes.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve. To serve, remove the sides of the pan and top with fresh whipped cream. Sprinkle with additional chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
